docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM JOHN MCFARLANE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLANE, WILLIAM JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
